name: Windows Defender Exclusion Deleted
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: @BarryShooshooga
SIGMA Title: Windows Defender Exclusion Deleted
SIGMA Description: Detects when a Windows Defender exclusion has been deleted. This could indicate an attacker trying to delete their tracks by removing the added exclusions


False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4660 AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\microsoft\windows defender\exclusions\%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Windows Defender Exclusion Deleted on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4660 AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\microsoft\windows defender\exclusions\%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Windows Defender Exclusion Deleted
